title: Luffy Finds Nami’s Room
description: On pages 21–24, luffy finds nami’s room focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong attacks with overwhelming fish-man strength while Luffy fights for Nami and the village.
scene: On pages 21–24, luffy finds nami’s room focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong attacks with overwhelming fish-man strength while Luffy fights for Nami and the village.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: the longer this hell will continue...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wha...! Just what kinda bones is that nose made up of!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He pierced the ground with just his nose!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Luffy, hide! Arlong jumped back into the water again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: hurry up and hide, brother luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid! He's aiming for you right now! You've got to hide right away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: and crush that nose of his...!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
